summary: Removed 14 redundant AddTool blocks from internal/mcp/tools.go: 13 `collections_get-<collection>` mirrors and the `pdok-location-search_search` raw endpoint mirror.
reason: The 13 per-collection mirrors are constant-id forms of the parametric `collections_get` tool (one tool that takes the collection id covers them all). `pdok-location-search_search` is the auto-renamed broken endpoint that was already hidden from the CLI. Removing them improves token efficiency for agents loading the MCP tool list.
validated_outcome: Tool count down from 24 to 10 in the hand-written set (the cobratree mirror still surfaces all user-facing Cobra commands).
